ChangeRequest.name: Collateral derived data should be Collateral received derived data
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview The derived data entity type _Collateral derived data_ must be renamed to _Collateral **received** derived data_ and relocated from _Collateral_ to _Collateral received_.
### Contact person _[arianna.nuvoli@ecb.europa.eu]_
### Description of change request For the inclusion of the indicator _Available for encumbrance_, we added the role construct to the _Collateral_. They can have two roles (currently): received, and given. The attributes `Encumbered Asset indicator` and `Collateral reuse indicator` are only valid for the _Collateral received_ and because we are as explicit as possible in the LDM, we need to move the entity type _Collateral derived data_ from the _Collateral_ to the _Collateral received_. And it has to be renamed to _Collateral received derived data_, with a definition that matches the new name. The relationship type has to be renamed too. ### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes - Collateral derived data - Collateral received
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
